race.comment: The maiden stayers kick us off. SHOW'EM WHO'S KING (6) has gotten better with each run and looks to be building up to a maiden victory. Peisley sticks in the irons following the past couple of outings and strikes a very winnable contest here. Rates the testing material. BON RIVIERE (1) went down by the narrowest of margins at Dalby last time out and should be ready for the step-up in trip now. Looms as the main danger. The well-related ZAYYANO (8) (half to 2xG1 winner Grunt) is drawn to get all the favours from the inside alley and has been kept ticking over with a recent trial win. Top-three commodity. IRISH HANDCUFFS (3) placed over this track and trip at the latest effort and looks a must for the exotics players.
